result_summary.description: Thick black irregularly circular shape with a white hole/spot in the center, resembling a heavy ink blot or filled ring.
Two capital letter 'X' characters in bold serif font, with a small dot or mark before the first X
A diamond (rotated square) outline with a small filled dot in its center, accompanied by a short vertical line to its left.
A diamond (rotated square) outline with a small filled square/dot in the center, rendered in bold black on a white background.
A black diamond/rhombus outline with a small filled square/dot in the center. To the left is a partial geometric bracket or corner shape.
A diamond (rotated square) outline containing a small dot in its center, with a partial diagonal line/stroke to the left.
A black diamond/rhombus shape with a small square (dot) in its center, with a partial bracket-like shape visible to the left.
A black diamond/rhombus outline with a small black dot in its center, set against a light background with some noise.
A black diamond (rotated square) outline with a small filled dot in its center, flanked on left and right by partial V-shaped or Y-shaped marks.
A black diamond (rotated square) outline with a small filled black dot in its center. A vertical bar appears to the left, possibly part of an adjacent glyph or separator.
A diamond/rhombus shape with a small filled dot in its center, with a partial hook/bracket shape visible to its left.
A thick black diamond (rotated square) outline with a small black dot centered inside it.
A black-outlined rhombus/diamond shape with a small filled square or dot at its center, set against a white background. The right edge of the crop shows partial fragments of additional characters.
A diamond (rotated square) outline with a small filled dot in the center
A black diamond (rhombus) shape with a small dot in its center
A black diamond (rotated square) outline with a small dot or circle in its center, positioned to the left of a partially visible character that looks like a fragment of a 'Y' or 'X'.
A solid black filled diamond/rhombus shape with a small circular white dot in the center.
A black diamond (rhombus) outline with a small filled dot in the center
